docs.text: Epic7 Bot Project documentation. Epic7 Bot is a Epic 7 toolkit/bot used via cli to perform automated actions inside the game. All actions are cheat detection proof by doing only randomized click inputs inside the emulator screen. Visit introductory tutorial to start using it.
docs.title: Home

docs.text: Project documentation. Epic7 Bot is a Epic 7 toolkit/bot used via cli to perform automated actions inside the game. All actions are cheat detection proof by doing only randomized click inputs inside the emulator screen. Visit introductory tutorial to start using it.
docs.title: Epic7 Bot

docs.text: Getting Started with Epic7 Bot An introductory tutorial! Requirements Chocolatey Android Debug Bridge Python 3.4+ Git Installation To install Epic7 Bot, run the following command from the command line: pip install git+https://github.com/brunocordioli072/epic7_bot For more details, see the Installation Guide . Using the CLI To see the commands, run the following command from the command line: epic7 --help Take a moment to review all the commands available. Getting help See the User Guide for more complete documentation of all of Epic7 Bot' features. To get help with MkDocs, please use the GitHub discussions or GitHub issues .
docs.title: Getting Started

You can jump directly to a page listed below, or use the next and previous buttons in the navigation bar at the top of the page to move through the documentation in order. Installation Commands

docs.title: User Guide

docs.text: Commands A detailed guide of each command. There are various commands and options available. For a complete list of commands, use the --help flag $ epic7 --help Shop Command The shop command does the automatic Secret Shop Refresh. To use it run the following command: $ epic7 shop Example of shop command running: Arena Command The arena command does the automatic battle of NPCs on arena. To use it run the following command: $ epic7 arena Example of arena command running: Hunt Command The hunt command does the automatic battle of wyvern hunt, restart battle after each finished autobattle until out of energy. To use it run the following command: $ epic7 hunt Example of hunt command running: Daily Command The daily command does all daily actions, like daily summon and pet summon, sanctuary daily rewards, guild donations, etc. To use it run the following command: $ epic7 daily
docs.title: Commands

docs.text: Installation A detailed guide. Requirements Python 3.4+ Chocolatey Android Debug Bridge Git Install Python Visit Python install page . Install the windows installer one. Installing Chocolatey Chocolatey is a package manager for windows. It is easier to install all the requirements by using it. Visit Chocolatey install page . Installing Android Debug Bridge Android Debug Bridge is command-line tool that enable communication with a device. The bot uses it to sent click inputs to the screen. Install via Chocolatey . $ choco install adb Installing Git Git is a distributed version control system. It's used to enable installation direcly via repo. $ choco install git Install Epic7 Bot To install Epic7 Bot, run the following command from the command line: pip install git+https://github.com/brunocordioli072/epic7_bot
docs.title: Instalation
